description: Two pages are recipes or technical instructions in Arabic script, and the other two pages may be drafts of phrases from letters in Arabic script. Pinholes at the margin ~4mm apart. Glue stains, leather traces and other signs of having been in a book binding.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
